Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Pltfs;
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Continued To Nov-10-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Objection Free Responses From Pltfs Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories From Pltf; Request For Production, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. 1. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Objection-Free Responses To Form Interrogatories [Set One], Special Interrogatories [Set One], and Request For Production [Set One] as to plaintiff Ledicia Galo granted;
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Plaintiff Ledicia Galo shall serve full, complete and verified responses to Form Interrogatories [Set One], Special Interrogatories [Set One], and Request For Production [Set One] within twenty days of the date of this order
2. Motion To Compel Objection-Free Responses To Form Interrogatories [Set One] as to plaintiffs Juliette Galo and Justine Galo granted;
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Plaintiff Ledicia Galo shall serve full, complete and verified responses to Form Interrogatories [Set One], Special Interrogatories [Set One], and Request For Production [Set One] within twenty days of the date of this order
3. Sanctions shall issue as follows:
a. Sanctions in the sum of $250.00 against plaintiff Ledicia Galo, stayed for twenty days from the date of this order; if full, complete and verified responses are served as ordered, sanctions shall be permanently stayed;
b. Sanctions in the sum of $250.00, jointly and severally, against plaintiffs Juliette Galo and Justine Galo, stayed for twenty days from the date of this order; if full, complete and verified responses are served as ordered, sanctions shall be permanently stayed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
